ham.subject: Transaction Alert: Your Account Was Debited
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

This is a notification from ABC Bank regarding a recent transaction on your account. 

Date: 15-04-2026
Time: 10:30 AM
Amount: INR 5,000
Account Ending: 1234

If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact our 24/7 helpline immediately at 1800-123-456.

Thank you for banking with us.

Best Regards,
ABC Bank

spam.subject: URGENT: Verify Your Scholarship Eligibility NOW
spam.body:
Dear Applicant,

Congratulations! You have been shortlisted for the prestigious XYZ University Merit Scholarship. To secure this award, you must complete a quick verification of your personal details.

Please click the link below to access our secure portal and confirm your information. Respond within 48 hours to avoid forfeiture of the scholarship.

<URL>

We appreciate your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
Scholarship Office
XYZ University
